labels.note: editContents() handles all supported LaTeX element types through a long conditional and performs content insertion, command execution, and editor updates.
labels.refactoringNote: Move the document-editing responsibility from the GUI class to AddLatexCommand, leaving MainWindow responsible only for gathering user input and updating the view.

labels.note: editContents() repeatedly combines the text before the caret, a type-specific LaTeX fragment, and the text after the caret in each conditional branch.
labels.refactoringNote: Extract the common insertion workflow and isolate the mapping from element type to LaTeX fragment; then move the resulting application logic to AddLatexCommand.
